description_long: This object consists of two weathered sedans, both exhibiting significant rust and dirt across their exteriors, suggesting long-term exposure to harsh urban environments. The left sedan is predominantly dark brown with heavy rust patches, while the right sedan is a faded yellow with similar signs of corrosion and grime. Both vehicles have blacked-out windows, missing or darkened headlights, and black wheels, giving them an abandoned or derelict appearance. The body shapes are boxy and reminiscent of late 20th-century American sedans, with four doors and a traditional trunk. The yellow sedan has faint, worn markings on the side, possibly indicating it was once a taxi. License plates are visible on the rear of both cars, though the text is not fully legible. These sedans would fit well in scenes depicting urban decay, post-apocalyptic settings, or neglected city streets.
description: Two heavily rusted, abandoned sedans—one dark brown, one yellow—showing extensive weathering, blacked-out windows, and black wheels, evoking a sense of urban decay.
description_view_0: Front view showing the dark brown sedan on the left and the yellow sedan on the right, both with rusted hoods and blacked-out windshields.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the yellow sedan's faded taxi markings and the dark brown sedan's extensive rust along the doors and roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying both sedans' trunks and license plates, with visible rust and dirt accumulation on the back surfaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the yellow sedan's cleaner side and the dark brown sedan's heavily corroded panels and roof.
attribute_license_plate: Rear license plates visible on both cars, rectangular, with a greenish tint; text not fully legible.
attribute_wheel_design: Solid black wheels with no visible spokes or hubcap details, appearing utilitarian and worn.
